name: Neuropoly Multimodal Model for MS Multi-Spine Challenge 2024
author: Neuropoly
description: Multimodal model for the MS Multi-Spine Challenge 2024. This model processes input data and generates segmentation results with probability.
command-line: unzip [INPUT_ARCHIVE] -d input; mkdir outdir; python3 scripts/main.py -i input -o outdir;  tar -cvzf [OUTPUT_FILE] outdir

inputs.name: Input archive
inputs.description: Input archive containing all files available for one patient

output-files.description: Tarball containing results. Results are expected under the form of a .nii and a .csv file, both written in the OUTDIR
output-files.name: Output archive
